'''Shorty''' was a nickname given to a [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]] droid on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was secretly a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agent. The unit helped refugees on Cloud City to reach Rebel safeworlds.

==Behind the scenes==
Shorty was also the name given to the character Short Round in the Lucas/Spielberg film Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom, who was in turn named after the film's producers William Hycuk and Gloria Katz's dog Short Round.

{{Droid-stub}}
